2188040.name: RPGScenery - Shipwreck Island
2188040.description:
A white sandy beach hides among the rocks protruding from the small coral reef. Next to the cliffs, an old shipwreck lies in silence. Its planks have rotted and are mostly covered with moss. Between the rocks is a harbor built of picked wood waste, with a perfect view of the azure water and the coral reef below. The rocks hide countless little hiding places. At the foot of one of the cliffs lies a tiny, private sandy beach.

This DLC contains 5 battlemaps to help you to bring your TTRPG session to the next level
